parsed_review.summary: CP00-518 is a descriptor-only Risk B closeout pack (40 units, RP17.P02.M03.S01-RP17.P02.M04.S15) for the RP17 AI Governance core program. Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the pack is sound and its claims are supported. (1) Production_ready posture is correctly conservative: manifest and command-evidence record production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status implemented_pending_review; the only positive claim is descriptor verification (production_ready_flag ai_governance_core_p02_implementation_slice_descriptor_verified), which is backed by construction in service.js, tests in test/model.test.js, and deep-equal contract assertions in scripts/validate-rp17-ai-governance-core-contract.mjs. The pack does not overclaim production_ready or enterprise trust, so production_ready gates are preserved. (2) Coverage is exact: recomputed deliverable distribution {contract:2, implementation:17, security_audit:4, ui:6, claude_review:3, failure_recovery:2, test:4, fixture:1, hermes_evidence:1}=40 matches requirements, validator, and manifest; M03=25/M04=15 row counts match; row keys are unique (no collision). (3) No-write/no-real-data boundaries are enforced: every descriptor row is descriptor_only/runtime_execution:false/raw_payload_included:false/customer_safe_errors_only:true, freezeCp518Result stamps every runtime, persistence, permission, audit, lock, and leak flag false, and input is discarded (void input upstream) so no real-data path exists despite runtime-sounding row titles. (4) Claude remains a read-only reviewer and not final approver: authority_boundary.claude_is_final_approval:false, no_write_attestation.promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, human_final_approval_required true. (5) Hermes appears only as deterministic evidence-packet/gate identifiers (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false); no product runtime is embedded. (6) Contract<->code consistency holds: contract current_pack, p02_implementation_slice_descriptor, cp518_requirements, and cp518_no_write_attestation match registry constants, historical_pack_bindings ends at CP00-518, and the upstream/next/subphase chain (CP517->CP518->CP519, next subphase RP17.P02.M04.S16) is continuous with the closeout plan. Review-hardening preconditions are clean: readiness auth-preflight passed with valid JSON (exit 0, 1456-byte stdout), and no forbidden review-evidence conditions (auth failure, 0-byte stdout, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, missing fields) are present. No P0-P3 findings. Pack closeout and goal closeout are not blocked; final human approval for any enterprise-trust/runtime-opening claim remains required and is out of scope for this read-only review.
